descriptionHtml:
Dufour 48 for Sale 2024 (AVAILABLE NOW), OPEN TO OFFERS

Introducing the Dufour Catamarans 48 For Sale 2024, a new catamaran in very good condition, designed for those seeking a comfortable and practical sailing experience. This vessel features a layout with 5 cabins and 5 bathrooms, making it suitable for families or groups. Additionally, there is a skipper cabin with its own head and waste tank, providing convenience for crew members.

Specifications:

  • Model: Dufour 48 (2024)
  • Condition: New
  • Cabins: 5 cabins (plus skipper cabin)
  • Bathrooms: 5 bathrooms
  • Engine: 2x 59 HP Nanni Diesel N4.65 (Kubota)
  • Cushions: Faux leather from the Contract collection - Advance for the flybridge, cockpit, and sundeck
  • Bimini: Wide flybridge bimini (Sunbrella)
  • Freezer: 12V 90L extra freezer (not compatible with 130L extra fridge)
  • Fans: 7 fans in saloon and cabins
  • Mooring Kit:
    • Ultra Anchor 45kg
    • Swivel
    • 75m chain (12mm galvanized)
    • 4 ropes (18mm, 25m)
    • 8 Polyform OF6 fenders
    • 2 round OA3 fenders
  • Winches: All electrical winches instead of manual
  • Toilets: Electric toilets in all 5 cabins
  • Microwave: 220V microwave
  • Gas Plancha: Built-in for outdoor cooking
  • Interior Pattern: WEST interior pattern

Sailing Features:

The Dufour 48 offers a solid sail plan, including a Dacron square top full batten mainsail and a self-tacking jib. These features make sailing manageable and efficient. The boat also includes lazyjacks and a lazybag for easy sail handling. One electric winch assists with sail management, and an electric windlass (1500W) is included, along with a manual dinghy hoist system.

  • Batteries: 5x GEL service batteries (165A)
  • Navigation Pack: Auto-pilot, 2 instruments, transducer, wind, compass
  • GPS Navigation: Raymarine AXIOM 12 MFD + keyboard MK10 at helm station
  • Fixed Bowsprit: With anchor roller cradle
  • Windlass Control: Chain counter included
  • VHF Radio: Located at the helm station
  • Rear Camera: Connected to the plotter for added safety

Comfort and Convenience:

The Dufour 48 focuses on comfort with various features to enhance the onboard experience. There are 220V sockets in all cabins as well as USB sockets in the saloon and cabins for charging devices. The inverter (2000W) allows for efficient use of onboard electronics.

Key comfort features include:

  • Teak Cockpit Table: Functional for dining and leisure
  • Flybridge Teak Table: For additional dining space outdoors
  • Curtains in Cabins: For privacy
  • Interior and Deck Courtesy Lighting: LED lights in the saloon, cockpit, transom, and flybridge
  • Audio System: Fusion audio pack (2 speakers in saloon, 2 in cockpit, 2 on the flybridge)
  • Swimming Ladders: With wide steps for easy access to the water
  • Asymmetrical Deck Fitting: For asymmetrical gennaker and additional winch
  • Pulpits with Wooden Seats: For added seating

Conclusion:

The Dufour 48 for sale 2024 is a well-designed catamaran that balances comfort and practicality, providing a great option for sailing enthusiasts. Whether for day trips or longer excursions, this vessel is equipped with a variety of amenities to support enjoyable outings on the water. If you are looking for a new catamaran that offers quality and functionality, the Dufour 48 is worth considering. Make this catamaran your next investment and enjoy your time on the water. We are looking forward to hearing from you and we can assist you all the way.

Contact Us Today for More Information!
